title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE MOUNT DATA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聰 TIPUNAN ANNEX IN SITIO TIPUNAN, BARANGAY MONAMON NORTE, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUKO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE FROM THE MOUNT DATA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS TIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 4556; 106 OG No. 7, 893 (February 15, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9811, November 26, 2009 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE MOUNT DATA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聰 TIPUNAN ANNEX IN SITIO TIPUNAN, BARANGAY MONAMON NORTE, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUKO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE FROM THE MOUNT DATA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS TIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

芒聙聰 The Mount Data National High School 芒聙聰 Tipunan Annex in Sitio Tipunan, Barangay Monamon Norte, Municipality of Bauko, Mountain Province is hereby separated from the Mount Data National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Tipunan National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聰 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Mount Data National High School 芒聙聰 Tipunan Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Tipunan National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Tipunan National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Mount Data National High School 芒聙聰 Tipunan Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

芒聙聰 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 2, 2008 and August 17, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 26 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
